Operation 'GET_Collections' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description is too brief and lacks context about pagination, return structure, and what collections represent. Added details about curation, pagination support, and collection purpose for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns playlists curated by in-house experts.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of curated music collections created by Epidemic Sound experts. Each collection contains a curated selection of tracks organized by theme or mood. Supports pagination parameters to control the number of results returned.
data.reasoning: Current description is too brief and lacks context about pagination, return structure, and what collections represent. Added details about curation, pagination support, and collection purpose for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'GET_Collection' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary 'Collection details' is vague about what details are returned. Description doesn't clarify that it returns both collection metadata and tracks, or mention pagination support. Enhanced both to clearly indicate the dual nature of the response and pagination capabilities.

data.current_description: List all tracks in a specific collection.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific collection including all tracks it contains. Returns the collection metadata (name, description, images) along with a paginated list of tracks. Supports pagination parameters to control track result size and offset.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Collection details' is vague about what details are returned. Description doesn't clarify that it returns both collection metadata and tracks, or mention pagination support. Enhanced both to clearly indicate the dual nature of the response and pagination capabilities.

message: Operation 'GET_Tracks_Search' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about search scope (full-text), what fields are searched, pagination support, and filtering capabilities. This helps AI agents understand the search capabilities and how to construct effective queries.

data.current_description: Search the entire Epidemic Sound library.
data.summary_suggestion: Search tracks across Epidemic Sound library
data.description_suggestion: Searches the entire Epidemic Sound music catalog by query string. Supports full-text search across track titles, artists, and metadata. Returns a paginated list of matching tracks with relevance ranking. Supports filtering by mood, genre, and other parameters to refine results.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too generic. Added specificity about search scope (full-text), what fields are searched, pagination support, and filtering capabilities. This helps AI agents understand the search capabilities and how to construct effective queries.

message: Operation 'GET_Tracks_Search_suggestions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Summary 'Search autosuggest' uses informal terminology. Description lacks detail about what types of suggestions are returned and use cases. Enhanced to clarify suggestion categories and practical application for AI agents.

data.current_description: Get autocomplete suggestions for music search.
data.description_suggestion: Returns autocomplete suggestions based on a partial search query. Provides real-time suggestions for track titles, artists, genres, and moods to assist users in refining their search. Useful for implementing search-as-you-type functionality.
data.reasoning: Summary 'Search autosuggest' uses informal terminology. Description lacks detail about what types of suggestions are returned and use cases. Enhanced to clarify suggestion categories and practical application for AI agents.

message: Operation 'GET_Track_Parameters' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Summary is vague about what 'parameters' means. Description only mentions genres and moods but suggests there are more. Enhanced to clarify this is a reference endpoint for valid filter values, explain its use case, and indicate it returns enumerated options for dynamic UI construction.

data.current_description: Get a list of possible track query parameters (genres, moods).
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete list of available parameters for filtering and querying tracks, including all valid genres, moods, and other track attributes. Returns enumerated values that can be used in track search and filter operations. Useful for building dynamic filter UIs and validating query parameters.
data.reasoning: Summary is vague about what 'parameters' means. Description only mentions genres and moods but suggests there are more. Enhanced to clarify this is a reference endpoint for valid filter values, explain its use case, and indicate it returns enumerated options for dynamic UI construction.

message: Operation 'GET_All_Moods' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details. Current description is vague about what is returned and doesn't mention pagination. Enhanced to clarify the response structure, explain the use case for mood browsing, and note pagination support for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Browse the music catalog based on moods.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all available moods in the Epidemic Sound catalog. Each mood item includes metadata such as mood name and identifier. Can be used to populate mood filters or browse tracks by emotional category. Supports pagination parameters.
data.reasoning: Current description is vague about what is returned and doesn't mention pagination. Enhanced to clarify the response structure, explain the use case for mood browsing, and note pagination support for better AI agent understanding.
